title: Frances Heitkemper
text: I am a rising sophomore (class of 2029) at Haverford College, interested in majoring in statistics and minoring in computer science, economics, and German.

title: European Parenting Leave Policies
text:
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(gganimate)
library(magick)
library(broom)


eplp <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-06-02/eplp.csv')


europe <- ne_countries(continent = "europe", returnclass = "sf")
yrs <- sort(unique(eplp$year))

p <- europe |>
    mutate(country2 = ifelse(iso_a2_eh == "GB", "UK", iso_a2_eh)) |>
    tidyr::expand_grid(year = yrs) |>
    st_as_sf() |>
    left_join(eplp, by = c("country2" = "country", "year")) |>
    #filter(year %in% c(1990, 1995, 2000, 2005)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = jp_ld_m)) +
    coord_sf(xlim = c(-10, 45), ylim = c(27,84)) +
    #facet_wrap(~year)
    transition_states(year, transition_length = 0, state_length = 1) +
        labs(title = "year: {closest_state}")

    animate(p)









eplp |>
    ggplot(aes(x = par1_ld, y = jp_ld_m, color = year)) +
    geom_point() +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
    facet_wrap( ~ par2_for_whom)









lm(jp_ld_m ~ par1_ld, data = eplp) |>
    tidy()

# A tibble: 2 × 5
  term        estimate std.error statistic   p.value
  <chr>          <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>
1 (Intercept)   45.4      1.54        29.5 3.72e-143
2 par1_ld        0.765    0.0261      29.3 1.06e-141

title: UK Baby Names
text:
library(tidyverse)


england_wales_names <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-06-16/england_wales_names.csv')
ni_names <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-06-16/ni_names.csv')
scotland_names <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-06-16/scotland_names.csv')


scotland_names |>
filter(Name %in% c("Frida", "Frances", "Natalie", "Sam")) |>
ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = Number, shape = Sex)) +
geom_point(color = "purple") +
geom_line(aes(color=Name))







labs(title = "baby names")

<ggplot2::labels> List of 1
 $ title: chr "baby names"
